title: Basic Materials
description: Basic metals and materials for other mods to use.
body:
[![Build Status](https://img.shields.io/github/workflow/status/UpcraftLP/Basic-Materials/Build%20Status?label=Build%20Status&logo=GitHub&style=flat-square)](https://github.com/UpcraftLP/Basic-Materials/actions?query=workflow%3A%22Build+Status%22 "GitHub Actions") [![Latest GitHub Release](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/UpcraftLP/Basic-Materials?include_prereleases&label=Github%20Releases&logo=GitHub&style=flat-square)](https://github.com/UpcraftLP/Basic-Materials/releases/latest "GitHub Releases") [![Latest Maven Release](https://img.shields.io/maven-metadata/v?color=7f7fff&label=Maven&metadataUrl=https%3A%2F%2Fmaven.onyxstudios.dev%2Fdev%2Fupcraft%2FBasic-Materials%2Fmaven-metadata.xml&logo=apache-maven&style=flat-square)](https://maven.onyxstudios.dev/dev/upcraft/Basic-Materials "OnyxStudios Maven")

Basic materials (ores / ingots / storage blocks) and world generation for other mods to use.
